posts.author: Bhargav_Nanduri
posts.text: Feature Suggestion: Display (user's preferred) indicator values (ex: RSI) directly in Watchlist against/near the scrip/symbol for quick glance and faster decision-making! — It will definitely be helpful, I’ll tell you why. Most traders/investors will use charts and indicators, and will track few stocks be it recommended or self screened. Just by showing their indicator’s value, like in the example I’ve given it only makes their life easier. No need to open multiple charts to track the indicator, no need to set alerts, or have notifications (these can become add-ons). When a trader or investor…

posts.author: siva
posts.text: Feature Suggestion: Display (user's preferred) indicator values (ex: RSI) directly in Watchlist against/near the scrip/symbol for quick glance and faster decision-making! — Not sure if offering on market watch will add extra value for large set of users, in fact it will complicate watch list. Alternative one can use streak to set alert on technical indicators.

posts.author: Bhargav_Nanduri
posts.text: Feature Suggestion: Display (user's preferred) indicator values (ex: RSI) directly in Watchlist against/near the scrip/symbol for quick glance and faster decision-making! — Hi everyone, I have a feature suggestion that could be very useful for active traders and investors. Many users follow one or two key indicators like RSI, VWAP, EMA, SMA, MACD, Supertrend, etc. Currently, to check these values, we need to either open each chart individually or depend on alerts/notifications. This takes extra time, especially when tracking multiple stocks or indices. It would be extremely helpful if the plat…
